title: valeriana wolgensis var. nitida
intro: Valeriana wolgensis var. nitida, also known as the fragrant valerian, is a variety of valerian plants native to Eastern Asia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of valerenic acid, which has been found to have sedative, antispasmodic, and anti-anxiety effects. The health benefits of Valeriana wolgensis var. nitida include improved sleep quality, reduced stress and anxiety, and relief from muscle spasms and menstrual cramps. Herbal preparations of Valeriana wolgensis var. nitida include teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
